matches.x: PSALM LXV. The blessedness of God’s chosen. To the chief Musician, A Psalm and Song of David. RAISE waiteth for thee, O God, in Zion; and unto thee shall the vow be performed. ;

3. My son, do not tell all that thou hearest, ‘and do not disclose all that thou seest.
